name: Anotherblock

custodian.name: Royalty rights held by SPV; Anotherblock as administrator

auditor.name: Royalty distribution audited by music industry administrator

regulator.name: EU MiCA (asset-referenced tokens framework); Swedish FI (consumer protection)

summary: Music royalty fractionalization platform. Acquires share of master recording royalties from artists/labels and offers fractional ownership to fans/investors. Notable catalog: The Weeknd ('Blinding Lights'), R3HAB, Rihanna, Big Sean. Tokens represent claim on streaming royalty cashflows (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.). Most operationally mature consumer-facing music IP tokenization; addresses real demand gap (retail access to royalty income previously gated by Hipgnosis-style funds).

sources.title: Music Business Worldwide: Anotherblock The Weeknd royalty offering

underlying_asset: Share of master recording royalties from specific tracks; Anotherblock acquires rights from labels/artists then fractionalizes.
reserve_composition: Per-track royalty entitlement; each token represents proportional share of net royalty income.
secondary_market: Anotherblock internal marketplace; some secondary trading on-chain (ERC-1155 transferability).
oracle_provider: N/A — royalty cashflows distributed off-chain quarterly based on industry royalty reports.
redemption_mechanism: No principal redemption; holders earn streaming royalty distributions for duration of rights ownership.

timeline.event: Anotherblock launches with first artist offerings
The Weeknd 'Blinding Lights' fractional royalty offering
Catalog expands to ~30+ tracks; first quarterly royalty distributions paid
